calendar.matters:
MOTION OF WITHDRAWL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD (MOVING PARTY: ALICIA LIANG, RAYMOND DONG)
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Joanna Bokter, Esq. Via Zoom Video Call representing Defendants Alice Liang and Raymond Dong who were present and assisteed by Cantonese speaking interpreter Edward Chu.
Stephen Booth, Esq. representing Plaintiff Jennifer Hawkins.

Hearing held.

Plaintiff counsel represents that the case is no longer at issue and has filed a dismissal.
Defense counsel echos plaintiff counsel and represents that services to the defendants are effectively terminated.

The court did not want defendants to disclose privilege information in open court.

The Court DENIES the motion to be relieved as Counsel and orders counsel to advise her clients to the satisfaction of the court.

Defense counsel to prepare an order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION OF WITHDRAWL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD (MOVING PARTY: ALICIA LIANG, RAYMOND DONG)
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Continued To May-06-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Johanna Boxtor; 626-921-4300; Yang Professional Law Corporation; counsel for defendants appearing via Zoom.
Alice Ailing and Raymond Don; defendants appearing in pro per

Defendants contest the courts tentative ruling. Ms. Boxtor requests the motion be granted as dismissal has been filed. Ms. Ailing states the matter is still going on and still needs the assistance of the attorney. The court suggests that the parties talk, discuss the case and return back. The court rules as follows:

MOTION OF WITHDRAWL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD (MOVING PARTY: ALICIA LIANG, RAYMOND DONG)is CONTINUED to May 6, 2026. Ms. Boxtor to give notice.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: REY S. YANG AND JOHANNA BOKTOR'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR ALICE AILING LIANG, RAYMOND DONG)

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in Department 501 on April 6, 2026. That department handles all trespass/real property law and motion matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
